description: The Republic of Ireland's Health Service Executive (HSE) has approved nivolumab as a monotherapy treatment option for the adjuvant treatment of adults with muscle invasive urothelial carcinoma (MIUC) with tumour cell PD-L1 expression >= 1%, who are at high risk of recurrence after undergoing radical resection of MIUC, providing patients are unsuitable for adjuvant treatment with platinum based chemotherapy.

contributions.description: Adding HSE approvals for reimbursement to database

contributor.name: Van Allen lab
